name: PartFeatureOperationEnum
description: Constants identifying the type of Boolean operation to be performed during this feature placement.

name: PartFeatureExtentDirectionEnum
description: Constants identifying the direction in which a feature extension needs to take place.
values: 20995  # Extension in positive AND negative direction.

name: PartFeatureExtentEnum
description: Constants identifying the type of Boolean operation to be performed during this feature placement.
values: 20756  # The extent definition for a sheet metal cut feature that cuts across the bends of the part.
20742  # Extent specified on both ends by a surface to extend from and to extend to.
20746  # Coil Extent specified by pitch and height.
20744  # Coil Extent specified by pitch and revolution.
20745  # Coil Extent specified by revolution and height.
20747  # Coil Extent specified by a spiral.
20743  # Extent specified as going through all faces encountered.
20741  # Extent specified by a surface to extend to.
20740  # Extent specified by extending to the next face encountered.

name: HealthStatusEnum
description: Constants signifying the state of the Object.
values: 11785  # Object is beyond stop node in the browser.
11782  # Object has been destroyed. You may be holding on to an empty 'shell' of the Object.
11780  # Object is driven by data from other Object(s), and one or more of them have been disconnected.
11786  # Object is inconsistent with another object.
11781  # Object's internal state is in error.
11789  # Object has bad limits. e.g. max < min.
11788  # Object is newly added or unsuppressed and has not been solved yet.
11779  # Object needs to be recomputed with respect to its 'driver(s)'.
11787  # Object's solution is redundant with another object.

name: UnitsTypeEnum
description: Units Types. Each signifies a specific unit in a particular dimension or category of measurement.
values: 11277  # Database units for angle -- ALWAYS Radian.
11267  # Database units for length -- ALWAYS Centimeter.
11282  # Database units for mass -- ALWAYS Kilogram.
11294  # Database units for temperature -- ALWAYS Kelvin.
11289  # Database units for time -- ALWAYS Second.
11276  # Current default display units for Angle.
11266  # Current default display units for length.
11281  # Current default display units for Mass.
11293  # Current default display units for Temperature.
11288  # Current default display units for Time.
11345  # Mole Substance or gram molecular weight.
11265  # No dimension associated with this value.

name: AssemblyJointTypeEnum
description: Constants indicating the assembly joint type.

name: AngleConstraintSolutionTypeEnum
description: Constants that define the types of geometry that can be inferred from different faces.

name: PointIntentEnum
values: 57867  # Intent is at the end of a cone, cylinder central axis.
57866  # Intent is at the midpoint of a cone, cylinder central axis.

57861  # Intent is at the left side of the circle, arc, or ellipse.
57862  # Intent is at the right side of the circle, arc, or ellipse.
57863  # Intent is at the top of the circle, arc, or ellipse.
57858  # Intent is at the end of the curve.
